info.title: PSL Studio API
info.description: REST API for PSL Studio — a fashion product lifecycle management platform covering products, samples, events, campaigns, loans, media placements, and guests.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from POST /api/auth/login or POST /api/auth/register. Pass in the Authorization header as: Bearer <token>

sampleId.description: Existing sample ID for upsert (PUT only)

path.description: Public URL or local path to the uploaded file

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not authorized to access this resource

tags.name: Samples
tags.description: Physical sample data for a product

tags.name: Guests
tags.description: Event guest list and RSVP management

201.description: Account created successfully. A session cookie is set.

example.error: Un compte avec cet email existe déjà

429.description: Too many requests (rate limited: 5 per 15-minute window per IP)

post.summary: Log in with email and password

200.description: Login successful. A session cookie is set.

example.error: Email ou mot de passe incorrect

429.description: Too many requests (rate limited: 5 per 15-minute window per IP)

post.summary: Log out and clear session cookie

parameters.name: family
parameters.description: Filter by product family (e.g. accessories, shoes)

get.summary: Get a product by ID (with samples, campaigns, and events)
Get the sample for a product

200.description: Sample object or null if none exists

post.summary: Create or update the sample for a product
post.description: Creates a new sample. If a sample already exists for this product, updates it instead.

200.description: Existing sample updated (returned when sample already existed)

put.summary: Upsert the sample for a product
put.description: Creates or updates the sample. Supply `sampleId` in the body to target an existing sample.

get.summary: Generate a non-validation PDF report for a product
get.description: Returns an HTML document intended to be printed as a PDF. Contains product info, review notes, and review photos.

post.summary: Create a loan for a product

get.summary: List media placements for a product

post.summary: Create a media placement for a product

get.summary: Get an event by ID (with campaigns and products)

200.description: Event detail with campaigns and products

post.summary: Add or update a product in an event (upsert)

delete.summary: Remove a product from an event

200.description: Array of guests, sorted by category then last name

post.summary: Add a guest to an event

get.summary: Get a campaign by ID (with products and event)

200.description: Campaign detail with products and linked event

post.summary: Add or update a product in a campaign (upsert)

delete.summary: Remove a product from a campaign

patch.summary: Update a guest (RSVP, check-in, seating, etc.)

post.summary: Refresh shipment tracking status for a sample via 17track
post.description: Calls the 17track API and persists the latest status on the sample record.

500.description: 17track API key not configured or upstream API error

502.description: Bad gateway — 17track API returned a non-OK response

post.description: Accepts multipart/form-data. Maximum file size: 10 MB. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, PDF. In production, files are stored in Vercel Blob; in development they are written to public/uploads.

folder.description: Destination folder name (alphanumeric, hyphen, underscore). Defaults to 'general'.

400.description: No file provided or invalid path
